ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( NOT($Setup.ShGl_DisableBusinessLogic__c.Disable_Entitlement_Validation_Rules__c), NOT(ISNEW()), $User.Alias <> 'autoproc', NOT(INCLUDES($User.RBAC_Group__c, 'API')), NOT(INCLUDES($User.RBAC_Group__c, 'IT System Admin')), NOT(INCLUDES($User.RBAC_Group__c, 'IT Prod Ops Support')), NOT(INCLUDES($User.RBAC_Group__c, 'System - IT')) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: You aren’t authorized to edit scale entitlements, hence please create a support ticket with ProdOps Support or email "ProdOpsapps@rubrik.com” with details
